ti:edition.ti:label: Caligula
ti:edition.ti:description: Suetonius. De Vita Caesarum Libri VIII. Ihm, Max, editor; Leipzig: Teubner, 1908.

ti:translation.ti:label: C. Caligula
ti:translation.ti:description: Suetonius. The Lives of the Twelve Caesars. Thomson, Alexander, M.D, translator; Reed, J.E., editor. Philadelphia: Gebbie, 1883.

ti:translation.ti:label: Augustus
ti:translation.ti:description: Suetonius. Rolfe, John C., translator. London: William Heineman; New York: The Macmillan Company, 1914.
